creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
1) ssh -Y some.other.host
2) VirtualBox
3) Click "New"
4) Try to enter a VM name in the "Name" box and there is no response.  Mouse events are still handled properly, so I can work around it by cutting and pasting the text I need from some other window.

FreeBSD sciprog.ceas bacon ~ 401: pkg info virtualbox\*
virtualbox-ose-5.1.14_2
virtualbox-ose-kmod-5.1.14
FreeBSD sciprog.ceas bacon ~ 402: kldstat|grep vbox
 4    1 0xffffffff81cc1000 7b9a8    vboxdrv.ko
